notes: Chunk 72 DONE (Template B, Tier B, 27 new routes, 1 block), closing every remaining reciprocal gap in the established Baltic/Slovenia/Caucasus/Lebanon/Rwanda/Caribbean hub-country cluster built up across chunks 61-71. Caucasus/Lebanon/Rwanda to Greece (6): Lebanon/Rwanda/Armenia/Georgia/Azerbaijan/Kazakhstan to Greece, all EU-unlisted-origin titre test plus 90-day wait; Lebanon-Greece is a rare direct Aegean/MEA BEY-ATH routing, the others connect via Istanbul. Rwanda to Ireland (1): titre test plus TRACES plus the dog tapeworm rule, web-confirmed broader than the data file states (applies to dogs from every country except Finland, Malta, Norway and Northern Ireland, not just Great Britain). Intra-EU inbound gap-fills, all straightforward EU pet passport moves with no titre test (18): Estonia from Greece/Ireland; Latvia from Portugal/Greece/Ireland; Lithuania from Portugal/Greece/Ireland plus Lithuania outbound to Poland/Hungary; Slovenia from Portugal/Czech Republic/Poland/Hungary/Greece/Ireland, with Czech Republic and Hungary to Slovenia both flagging driving as a realistic alternative given the short distance (600km and 350km) and Hungary to Slovenia noting Wizz Air carries no cargo pets from Budapest. Caribbean cluster (4): Dominican Republic to Sweden (titre test applies but Sweden, unlike Norway and Finland, has no mandatory tapeworm treatment since the parasite is already present in its own fox population); Greece to Dominican Republic and Greece/Ireland to Jamaica (no titre test into the DR; Jamaica's Preliminary Application Form, FAVN titre test and up to 14 days at Plumb Point apply regardless of origin). All 27 files verified structurally (YAML valid, requirements blocks are keyed maps, template_variant B, Marcus Webb byline) and QA-scanned for zero em dashes and zero banned vocabulary. This closes the last dense reciprocal-gap pocket from the chunks 61-71 build sequence; chunk 73 moves to a new Tier B cluster. Next: Chunk 73 (Template C, Tier B).

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
